title: S + V + N + as + S + V（as 引導關係子句）

formulas.zh: 像...一樣的名詞；用以指出具有相同特質的人或事物

formulas.formula: the same + N + as + S + V
formulas.zh: 與...相同的名詞；表示兩者在某方面完全相同
雖然...；讓步子句，as引導讓步概念

explanation: as在此句型中有兩種主要用法：(1)作關係代名詞，在such/the same結構中指代前面的名詞，引導定義性或描述性子句；(2)作從屬連接詞，引導讓步子句。such...as表示「像...一樣的」，強調相似性；the same...as表示「與...相同的」，強調完全一致。As引導的讓步子句置於句首時，後接主句。學生常混淆as與that的用法，應注意as具有對比或比較意義。

examples.eng: Such problems as you mentioned require careful analysis and discussion.
examples.chi: 像你提到的這類問題需要仔細分析和討論。

examples.eng: She has the same passion for music as her mother had in her youth.
examples.chi: 她對音樂的熱情與她母親年輕時一樣。

examples.eng: As the old saying goes, practice makes perfect in learning English.
examples.chi: 正如古諺所說，在英文學習中熟能生巧。

examples.eng: Young as he was, he showed remarkable courage and determination in facing challenges.
examples.chi: 雖然他年輕，但他在面對挑戰時表現出非凡的勇氣和決心。

adj_table_for.zh: 引人注目的；令人印象深刻的

extension.tip: 判斷as的角色：若as後接完整子句且前有such/the same，則as為關係代名詞；若as位於句首後跟形容詞或分詞，則引導讓步子句。注意such...as中的as不能改為that，而the same...as中的as不能改為with或like。

examples.test: Such students as work hard will succeed.
examples.result: ✓ 正確。as為關係代名詞，指代students

examples.test: Such students that work hard will succeed.
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤。應用as不用that，as具比較含義

examples.test: As difficult as the task was, they completed it successfully.
examples.result: ✓ 正確。As引導讓步子句，表示雖然任務困難

extension.note: 記住：such/the same後一定搭配as；As開頭通常引導讓步，表示「雖然...」。

parts: you face in your studies demand both patience and strategy.
exercises.sentence: Such challenges as you face in your studies demand both patience and strategy.
exercises.translation: 像你在學習中所面臨的這類挑戰需要耐心和策略。

exercises.sentence: He has the same passion for literature as his grandfather had decades ago.
exercises.translation: 他對文學的熱情與他祖父幾十年前的一樣。

parts: the goal is, we must never lose sight of our principles.
exercises.sentence: As important as the goal is, we must never lose sight of our principles.
exercises.translation: 雖然目標很重要，但我們絕不能忽視我們的原則。

parts: rarely come your way deserve your full attention and commitment.
exercises.sentence: Such opportunities as rarely come your way deserve your full attention and commitment.
exercises.translation: 像那些很少來臨的機會應該得到你的充分關注和承諾。
